channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-312] sanity-quota failed on RHEL6
item.description:
Running test suites including sanity-quota, got following errors:

-------------client-5-----------------------------------
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: ----============= acceptance-small: sanity-quota ============---- Wed May 11 22:04:26 PDT 2011
Lustre: 4728:0:(debug.c:320:libcfs_debug_str2mask()) You are trying to use a numerical value for the mask - this will be deprecated in a future release.
Lustre: 5065:0:(sec.c:1474:sptlrpc_import_sec_adapt()) import MGC192.168.4.128@o2ib->MGC192.168.4.128@o2ib_0 netid 50000: select flavor null
LustreError: 152-6: Ignoring deprecated mount option 'acl'.
Lustre: MGC192.168.4.128@o2ib: Reactivating import
Lustre: 5065:0:(sec.c:1474:sptlrpc_import_sec_adapt()) import lustre-MDT0000-mdc-ffff88032725e800->192.168.4.128@o2ib netid 50000: select flavor null
LustreError: 11-0: an error occurred while communicating with 192.168.4.128@o2ib. The mds_connect operation failed with -11
Lustre: 5065:0:(sec.c:1474:sptlrpc_import_sec_adapt()) import lustre-OST0000-osc-ffff88032725e800->192.168.4.129@o2ib netid 50000: select flavor null
Lustre: Client lustre-client has started
Lustre: 5086:0:(debug.c:320:libcfs_debug_str2mask()) You are trying to use a numerical value for the mask - this will be deprecated in a future release.
Lustre: 5086:0:(debug.c:320:libcfs_debug_str2mask()) Skipped 1 previous similar message
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Using TIMEOUT=20
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: excepting tests: 10 12
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: do the quotacheck ...
LustreError: 5839:0:(lmv_obd.c:852:lmv_iocontrol()) error: iocontrol MDC lustre-MDT0000_UUID on MDTidx 0 cmd 800866a1: err = -22
LustreError: 5839:0:(lmv_obd.c:852:lmv_iocontrol()) error: iocontrol MDC lustre-MDT0000_UUID on MDTidx 0 cmd 800866a1: err = -22
LustreError: 5839:0:(lmv_obd.c:852:lmv_iocontrol()) error: iocontrol MDC lustre-MDT0000_UUID on MDTidx 0 cmd 800866a1: err = -22
LustreError: 5839:0:(lmv_obd.c:852:lmv_iocontrol()) error: iocontrol MDC lustre-MDT0000_UUID on MDTidx 0 cmd 800866a1: err = -22
LustreError: 5839:0:(lmv_obd.c:852:lmv_iocontrol()) error: iocontrol MDC lustre-MDT0000_UUID on MDTidx 0 cmd 800866a1: err = -22
LustreError: 5839:0:(lmv_obd.c:852:lmv_iocontrol()) error: iocontrol MDC lustre-MDT0000_UUID on MDTidx 0 cmd 800866a1: err = -22
LustreError: 5839:0:(lmv_obd.c:852:lmv_iocontrol()) error: iocontrol MDC lustre-MDT0000_UUID on MDTidx 0 cmd 800866a1: err = -22
LustreError: 5839:0:(lmv_obd.c:852:lmv_iocontrol()) error: iocontrol MDC lustre-MDT0000_UUID on MDTidx 0 cmd 800866a1: err = -22
LustreError: 5839:0:(lmv_obd.c:852:lmv_iocontrol()) error: iocontrol MDC lustre-MDT0000_UUID on MDTidx 0 cmd 800866a1: err = -22
LustreError: 5839:0:(lmv_obd.c:852:lmv_iocontrol()) error: iocontrol MDC lustre-MDT0000_UUID on MDTidx 0 cmd 800866a1: err = -22
LustreError: 5839:0:(lmv_obd.c:852:lmv_iocontrol()) Skipped 1 previous similar message

--------------------------------fat-intel-1-----------------------------------------
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: ----============= acceptance-small: sanity-quota ============---- Wed May 11 22:04:26 PDT 2011
LDISKFS-fs warning (device sdb): ldiskfs_fill_super: extents feature not enabled on this filesystem, use tune2fs.
LDISKFS-fs (sdb): warning: maximal mount count reached, running e2fsck is recommended
LDISKFS-fs (sdb): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode
LDISKFS-fs warning (device sdb): ldiskfs_fill_super: extents feature not enabled on this filesystem, use tune2fs.
LDISKFS-fs (sdb): warning: maximal mount count reached, running e2fsck is recommended
LDISKFS-fs (sdb): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode
Lustre: lustre-MDT0000: temporarily refusing client connection from 192.168.4.5@o2ib
Lustre: Skipped 1 previous similar message
Lustre: MDS mdd_obd-lustre-MDT0000-0: lustre-OST0002_UUID now active, resetting orphans
Lustre: Skipped 13 previous similar messages
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Using TIMEOUT=20
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: excepting tests: 10 12
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: do the quotacheck ...
LustreError: 12279:0:(fsfilt-ldiskfs.c:2163:fsfilt_ldiskfs_quotacheck()) quotacheck failed: rc = -22
LustreError: 12279:0:(quota_check.c:112:target_quotacheck_thread()) mdd_obd-lustre-MDT0000-0: fsfilt_quotacheck: -22
item.environment:
lustre-master RHEL6-x86_64 build #114
client-5 is client, fat-intel-1 is mds

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Closing this old bug, since it has not been updated since it was filed.
I will try to reproduce it today and get more debug log.

I think we have to figure out why fsfilt_ldiskfs_quotacheck() return -EINVAL at first.

Hi, Sarah
Is it reproducable with running the sanity_quota only? Then we can trun on D_TRACE and D_QUOTA on mds to get some useful debug log.
Johann, yes, this is the test on RHEL6

Niu

Please look into this one when you have time.

Thanks

Peter

Lustre: MDS mdd_obd-lustre-MDT0000-0: lustre-OST0002_UUID now active, resetting orphans
^^^^^^^^^
hm, what's this?

Is this with RHEL6?
